widgets_values:
LAB flux-fast (FLUX.2 Klein 9B NVFP4 + Nunchaku)

1. Load Comfy template: Flux2 Klein text-to-image
2. Checkpoints expected under models/diffusion_models (via /models/comfy)
3. HF: black-forest-labs/FLUX.2-klein-9b-nvfp4
4. Optional Nunchaku: tonera/FLUX.2-klein-9B-Nunchaku
5. Target ~4s / 1024² on GB10 with NVFP4

Download: bazelisk run //scripts:run-utility -- download-flux run --tier fast
